dashboard.ssu_tip.title: ⬡ PRO TIP — USE SMART STORAGE UNITS
dashboard.ssu_tip.body: Many players store their resources in Field Storage — but Field Storage is not recorded on the blockchain, so EF Mining Planner cannot read those stocks.
dashboard.ssu_tip.benefits: By using Smart Storage Units (SSU) instead, you get:
dashboard.ssu_tip.b1: ✓ Full stock visibility in this app
dashboard.ssu_tip.b2: ✓ Accurate craft calculations based on your real inventory
dashboard.ssu_tip.b3: ✓ Better security — SSU resources are safer than Field Storage
dashboard.select.title: ⬡ SSU SELECTION FOR CONSTRUCTION
dashboard.select.body: Click on a Storage Unit to include or exclude it from your construction stock calculations.
dashboard.select.count: selected — stock from deselected SSU will be ignored in the Construction planner.
dashboard.no_char: Select a character in the Registry first
